rows.label: qev010402_MSG0001
rows.name:
Latte just got all flustered...
Sigh... Did she break something again...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010402_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Oh, a customer? Welcome!
Welcome to the Sunshine Cafe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010402_MSG0003
rows.name:
Where Latte might have gone... huh.
That girl has a surprisingly devout side to her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010402_MSG0004
rows.name:
If she messed something up,
she might be over at the cathedral.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010402_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Well, before apologizing to God,
she should be apologizing to me first.[ST:wait ]
